title: rhododendron spathulatum
intro: Rhododendron spathulatum, also known as the western azalea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron spathulatum include its ability to aid in the treatment of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Rhododendron spathulatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
